data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario of 'Individual cancellation within group', but the evidence provided does not confirm the implementation of key requirements such as legally vetted templates, electronic signature capture, and version control for signed waivers. The linked use cases outline these needs explicitly, yet the evidence indicates gaps in their fulfillment, leading to a failure in meeting the validation criteria. Specifically, the absence of evidence for these critical components directly supports the gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of legally vetted templates by industry.
No evidence of electronic signature capture functionality.
No evidence of version control for signed waivers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for legally vetted templates
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide documentation or confirmation of legally vetted templates for waivers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for electronic signature capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Demonstrate the functionality of electronic signature capture in the system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for version control of signed waivers
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm the implementation of version control for tracking signed waivers.
